action.reasoning: Observation: The previous evaluation yielded a new best IC of 0.053366 with an ensemble of 10 LightGBM models. Analysis: The ensemble approach is working very well. To further improve generalization and boost the IC, I will increase the ensemble size to 15 models. I will also lower the learning rate to 0.02 for more gradual learning, and set `colsample_bytree=0.7`, `subsample=0.7`, and `subsample_freq=1` to increase the diversity among the individual models in the ensemble. Decision: Update train.py with these new hyperparameters, run training and local test, and submit for evaluation.
